name: Credit System
desc: Developing a credit system project using MongoDB, leveraging its flexible document-based structure for efficient data storage and retrieval. This project aims to facilitate seamless credit management and tracking within a digital environment.

name: Spotify Clone
desc: Creating a Spotify clone using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to replicate the popular music streaming platform's user interface and functionality. This project endeavors to provide a familiar and immersive music listening experience for users while honing front-end development skills.
